Education.name: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication
Education.degree: Bachelor's in Tech - Electronics and Communication
details: Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, VLSI, IoT, Computer Networks
Activities and Societies: Gen Sec @ IEEE Photonics Club, Hack Club, Biosphere Club, Music Club.

Experience.title: Design Verification Engineer - G1, G2
details: Contributed to Matrix LED Controller updates for smart headlights/backlights, completed two incremental tape-outs, and worked on a Battery Management IP project.
Enhanced DV environments through automation inspired by Software Validation practices and contributed to the development of a high-speed In-Vehicle-Network Hub.
Headed and managed a Python application which automated Regression and Coverage features.

Experience.title: Project Intern
details: Developed an internal web application using ReactJS, Flask, and TensorFlow for image and video annotation.
Integrated Advanced ML Models: Incorporated SSD, RCNN, and YOLOv3 for data testing and batch processing workflows.

Projects.name: AI Annotation Tool for Data Testing
details: Developed a full-stack web application for image and video annotation using ReactJS, Flask, and TensorFlow.
Integrated object detection models including SSD, RCNN, and YOLOv3. Deployed internally for data testing and batch processing workflows.

Projects.name: Access Control System using 8051 Microcontroller and DC Motor
details: Developed an RFID-based access control system using 8051 microcontroller.
Enabled motor control for authorized entries, unauthorized access alerts, and real-time entry count tracking.

Publications.title: Revolutionizing Holy-Basil Cultivation with AI-Enabled Hydroponics System
details: Co-authored the paper Revolutionizing Holy-Basil Cultivation With AI-Enabled Hydroponics System.

Publications.title: SMADE - Smart Medical Assist Device
details: Co-authored the paper SMADE - Smart Medical Assist Device for Elders, published in Computer, Communication, and Signal Processing (ICCCSP 2022), IFIP AICT vol. 651, Springer.

Blogs.title: Getting Started with Design Verification in VLSI
Blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to understanding design verification methodologies in VLSI, covering testbench development, coverage analysis, and debugging techniques.

Blogs.title: Building IoT Solutions with Python and Arduino
Blogs.description: Learn how to create end-to-end IoT solutions by integrating Python backend services with Arduino-based sensors and actuators.

Blogs.title: React Portfolio Development: From Design to Deployment
Blogs.description: Step-by-step tutorial on creating a modern, responsive portfolio website using React, including design principles and deployment strategies.

Blogs.title: Machine Learning in Hardware Design: AI-Driven Verification
Blogs.description: Exploring the intersection of machine learning and hardware design verification, discussing how AI can improve testbench efficiency and bug detection.
